spec_match.rationale: Excellent spec modeling. Configures and displays all 5 background-clip values concurrently with identical sliders, allowing the browser to render each region's exact layout geometry natively.

interactive.rationale: High interactivity with synchronous sliders (border width and padding) driving all 5 boxes together, alongside custom background gradient preset pickers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly models and validates the blurb description.

edge_cases.rationale: Graceful degradation; if a browser does not support 'border-area', the other four boxes continue to render correctly, while the 'border-area' card behaves as normal transparent borders.

design_system.rationale: Fabulous custom SVG diagram illustrating the box model, high-contrast cards, highlighted blue outline for the new 150 property, and clear mono badge indicators.

summary: An outstanding comparative overview displaying all five background-clip values inside dynamic resizer boxes, enriched by a very clear inline SVG box model geometry explanation.
